name: Bee Venom
description: Bee venom, also known as apitoxin, is a bitter, colorless liquid extracted from bees. It is used in cosmetics as an astringent due to the presence of an enzyme called hyaluronidase, and as a skin protection agent due to its anti-inflammatory properties.Bee venom has been used for medicinal purposes since antiquity. It is said to have numerous virtues, including being effective against diseases such as multiple sclerosis and cancer. However, several studies have shown that there is no evidence to support the efficacy of the venom against multiple sclerosis, and no study to date has demonstrated any effect in the prevention or treatment of cancer.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Animal.

name: Basic Yellow 40
description: Basic Yellow 40 — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Synthetic.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Behenamidopropyl Dimethylamine
description: Behenamidopropyl Dimethylamine — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Synthetic.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Behenic Acid
description: Behenic Acid — косметический ингредиент.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

name: Behentrimonium Chloride
description: Behentrimonium Chloride is a quaternary ammonium mainly used in cosmetics as an anti-static agent or hair conditioner. For this reason, it is mainly used in hair care products. It is banned in organic farming.In 2010, in an opinion report, the Scientific Committee on Consumer Safety (SCCS) concluded that ‘In addition to the fact that formulations of quaternary ammonium derivatives have an irritant potential, particularly when combinations of the compounds concerned are used, the SCCS indicates that the use of CETRIMONIUM CHLORIDE, STEARTRIMONIUM CHLORIDE and BEHENTRIMONIUM CHLORIDE do not pose a risk to consumer health’ when used within the regulated concentration limits (see below).
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Behentrimonium Methosulfate
description: This ingredient is classified as ecotoxic according to REACH (Aquatic Acute 1, Aquatic Chronic 2).
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Bee Pollen Extract
description: Bee Pollen Extract — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Animal.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Animal.

name: Benzaldehyde
description: This ingredient is a synthetic aromatic compound with a bitter almond scent that is used in perfumes and scented cosmetic products. It is one of the allergens regulated in Europe.
note: Low penalty in all categories.

name: Benzalkonium Bromide
description: Benzalkonium Bromide — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Synthetic.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Behenyl Alcohol
description: Behenyl alcohol or Docosanol is a fatty alcohol. It is used in cosmetics as an emulsifier to keep oily parts well mixed with other liquids. It is also used as a thickener, to increase the foaming capacity of a product or to improve the stability of a foam. It makes the skin soft and its touch remains non-greasy after application. It is authorized in organic.In drugs, docosanol is used as an antiviral against herpes.The CIR (Cosmetic Ingredient Review) in an annual report published in 2008, concluded the safety of fatty alcohols.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Bentonite
description: Bentonite is a clay that usually comes from volcanic ash. It mainly consists of silica and aluminum as well as other minerals, including sodium, magnesium, calcium, iron oxide and potassium. Bentonite clay is used in cosmetics as a texturizer, filler, thickener and pigment binder.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Mineral.

name: Bellis Perennis Flower Extract
description: Bellis Perennis Flower Extract — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Vegetal.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Benzalkonium Saccharinate
description: Benzalkonium Saccharinate — косметический ингредиент.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

name: Behenyl Betaine
description: Behenyl Betaine — косметический ингредиент.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

name: Benzethonium Chloride
description: Benzethonium Chloride — косметический ингредиент.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании.

name: Benzoic Acid
description: Benzoic acid is used as a preservative in cosmetics. It is present naturally in the benzoin gum extracted from "Styrax" type trees, but is "unfortunately" often made in the laboratory from other chemicals. In food, it is used under the name E210. Benzoic acid is allowed in organic. It can irritate the eyes, skin, lungs and digestive tract, but generally does not pose a problem in regulatory concentrations.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Benzophenone-12
description: Benzophenone-12 — косметический ингредиент.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании.

name: Benzophenone
description: This ingredient has been banned in cosmetics in Europe since December 1, 2023.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Benzalkonium Chloride
description: Benzalkonium Chloride — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Synthetic.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Benzophenone-4
description: Benzophenone-4 (Sulisobenzone) is a chemical UV filter that protects the skin from UVB and UVA rays. It is suspected of polluting water and endangering aquatic life.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Benzophenone-5
description: Benzophenone-5 (Sulisobenzone sodium) is a chemical UV filter that protects the skin against UVB and UVA radiation. It is suspected of polluting water and endangering aquatic fauna. It is the sodium salt of Benzophenone-4. Because of the way it is produced, it is associated with an orange flower on our application.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Benzisothiazolinone
description: Benzisothiazolinone is a biocide used as a preservative in many products (paint, detergents, varnishes, adhesives ...). It has a fungicidal effect.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Benzophenone-8
description: Benzophenone-8 — косметический ингредиент.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании.

name: Benzophenone-1
description: Benzophenone-1 is a synthetic UVA absorber. It is suspected of being an endocrine disruptor for humans and aquatic life. It is notably implicated in the bleaching of coral reefs.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Benzophenone-2
description: Benzophenone-2 — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Synthetic.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

description: Benzophenone-9 — косметический ингредиент.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании.

name: Benzoyl Peroxide
description: Benzoyl Peroxide — косметический ингредиент.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

name: Benzyl Benzoate
description: Benzyl benzoate is an odorant molecule that is one of the allergens regulated by Europe. It is found naturally in Peru and Tolu balsams, as well as in Jasmine and Ylang-ylang essential oils. Benzyl Benzoate is part of the reference treatment in France for scabies (an infectious skin disease).
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Benzophenone-6
description: Benzophenone-6 — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Synthetic.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Benzotriazole
description: Benzotriazole — косметический ингредиент.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах.

name: Benzophenone-3
description: Benzophenone-3 (Oxybenzone) is a synthetic UV filter that protects the skin against both UVB and UVA rays. It is suspected of being an endocrine disruptor for humans and aquatic life. It is notably implicated in the bleaching phenomenon of coral reefs.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Benzyl Alcohol
description: Benzyl alcohol is one of the allergens regulated by Europe. It is mostly used as a preservative. It is naturally present in many plants and fruits, including Jasmine, garlic and Ylang-Ylang, as well as apricot, almond, apple and blackcurrant... Benzyl alcohol is authorized in organic farming.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Benzylhemiformal
description: Benzylhemiformal — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Synthetic.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Benzyl Cinnamate
description: Benzyl cinnamate is one of the regulated allergens in Europe. It occurs naturally in Peruvian balsam, Tolu balsam, copaiba balsam, and benzoin. It is used as a flavoring in essential oils or can be produced in laboratories.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Benzylidene Camphor Sulfonic Acid
description: Benzylidene camphor sulfonic acid is a chemical UV filter approved for use in cosmetics in Europe. It has a broad spectrum and absorbs both UVB and UVA rays. Due to its production method, it is associated with an orange flower in our app.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Benzylparaben
description: Benzylparaben — косметический ингредиент.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

name: Beta-Caryophyllene
description: Caryophyllene is a terpene with a woody, spicy, and earthy flavor. It is present in many essential oils and plants, particularly cannabis. It is one of the allergens regulated by Europe.
note: Low penalty in all categories.

name: Beta-Glucan
description: Beta-Glucan — косметический ингредиент.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

name: Benzyl Salicylate
description: Benzyl salicylate is one of Europe's regulated allergens. It is naturally produced by many plants and is used as a fragrance molecule in perfumed products: it is known for its light, balsamic, even musky scents. It is also a UV absorber, helping to stabilize products. The first sun creams were produced using this ingredient, but it was abandoned as it was not very effective.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Natural.

name: Beta-Sitosterol
description: Beta-Sitosterol — косметический ингредиент.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

name: Betaine
description: Betaine is used in cosmetics for its moisturizing power and its ability to protect the skin from irritation. It is also used in hair care to give them volume, improve their behavior and resistance. It is synthesized naturally by many plants, but also by some crustaceans. It is usually extracted from sugar beet or sugar cane.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Betaine Salicylate
description: Betaine Salicylate — косметический ингредиент.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Bha
description: Bha — косметический ингредиент.
common_product_types: Nail art, false nails and accessories (31.7%)
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах.

name: Bht
description: BHT or Butylhydroxytoluene is a phenol which is in the form of yellowish-white crystals. It is used for its antioxidant properties in cosmetics.IARC (International Center for Research on Cancer) classifies BHT among substances whose safety could not be established, the ARTAC (French Association for Therapeutic Anti-Cancer Research), class it, among the substances "probably carcinogenic".The substance is suspected to be an endocrine disruptor that can destabilize reproductive hormones in men and women. The molecule is also known as sensitizing, which can be a source of allergies.As far as it is possible in cosmetics to do otherwise, according to the precautionary principle, we classify this molecule in red on INCI Beauty.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Biosaccharide Gum-1
description: This ingredient is a polysaccharide which is also called Fucocert or Fucogel. It is made up of an assembly of sugars, obtained by biotechnology from plant substrates such as corn. It is used as a moisturizing active, to create a biofilm that protects against dehydration, it helps stimulate cell renewal. It also has an interesting anti-aging activity so that it is often compared to hyaluronic acid.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

description: Bis-Diglyceryl Polyacyladipate-2 is a wax that gives cosmetic products a soft, smooth texture. It is a synthetic ingredient. It is widely used in lip care products, where it boosts the product's moisturizing power.

name: Bisabolol
description: Bisabolol, also known as Levomenol, is obtained by distillation of certain essential oils, including wild camomile (Matricaria Recutita). It is in the form of a slightly fragrant oily liquid. It is used in cosmetics for its soothing properties, but is also known as an anti-inflammatory and healing agent. It is also for these functions (anti-irritant) that it is found in some toothpastes.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Boric Acid
description: Boric acid prevents or delays bacterial growth and thus protects cosmetics and personal care products from bacteria. It is also used to regulate the pH of formulas, or to thicken certain products. It also has astringent properties (tightens the pores).
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine
description: Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine (Bemotrizinol) is an organic (chemical) UV filter used in sunscreens. It has a broad spectrum and absorbs both UVA and UVB rays. Aside from its less-than-virtuous chemical transformation, the ingredient is considered biodegradable (soluble) and poses no known problems once released into the environment.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Bromelain
description: Bromelain is a mixture of enzymes found in pineapple juice. In cosmetics, it has an effect on the smoothing and whitening of the skin, as well as on the elimination of freckles. Bromelain can act on the dead cells of the stratum corneum to degrade and detach them. It is allowed in organic.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Butane
description: Butane (like isobutane) is a refrigerant and aerosol used as a substitute for CFCs and HFCs to limit the impact on the ozone layer and the greenhouse effect. It has a low impact on the environment. It may have a weak anesthetic effect and / or an asphyxiant effect by depletion of the oxygen content. It is a low CO2 emitter.
note: Low penalty in all categories.

name: Butyl Acetate
description: Butyl acetate is a solvent used in nail polish. It is used in general with ethyl acetate to help dissolve nitrocellulose well. It allows a uniform distribution of colors, plastics or film-forming agents in nail polish. It is forbidden in organic.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Butylene Glycol
description: Butylene Glycol is a chemical compound derived from petroleum, often used as humectant in skin care. It prevents the product from drying and makes the formulation more resistant to moisture. In sensitive individuals, butylene glycol may be irritating to skin, eyes and nasal passages, however it is considered the least irritating of all glycols. It can be authorized in organic, when it is bio-sourced and obtained by fermentation from sugar.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Vegetal.

description: Bumetrizole — косметический ингредиент.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах.

note: Требует осторожности при использовании.

name: Butylparaben
description: Butylparaben is a long-chain paraben used in cosmetics as a preservative. It is suspected of being an endocrine disruptor, and even identified as such by the official scientific bodies of the main European countries: present on List I (List of substances identified as endocrine disruptors at EU level) of the EDLists website.Following the precautionary principle, and given the many doubts that persist concerning Butylparaben, the ingredient is associated with a red flower on our application.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Butylphenyl Methylpropional
description: Lilial has been banned in Europe since March 1, 2022.
common_product_types: Care for dry and damaged hair (5.21%)
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Butyrospermum Parkii Butter
description: Shea butter is obtained from the fruit (nuts) of shea tree, a tree mainly present on the African continent. It is composed mainly of triglycerides, fatty acids, esters of wax and active ingredients: among them, vitamins (A, D, E), resinous esters, phytosterols, latex.It is used in many cosmetics for its soothing and softening properties for the epidermis. It can also protect the skin and scalp from many external aggressions.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane
description: Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane (Avobenzone) is a synthetic UVA filter. It absorbs UVA radiation (from 320 to 400 nm). It is accompanied by an orange flower on our app due to its environmentally unfriendly production method.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.
